B1: Same shape translated parallel to the x-axis with no evidence from the x-intercepts (if labelled) that the transformation is anything other than a translation. So the x intercepts (if labelled) must be 4 units apart. Ignore any coordinates on or near the maximum. B1: Minimum at the origin. The origin does not have to be labelled. B1: Passes through (вИТ4, 0) or at least вАЬreachesвАЭ this point from above or below. Allow just пА≠4 marked in the correct place and condone (0, вИТ4) as long as it is marked in the correct place. Allow to score away from the sketch as long as their curve passes through (or reaches) this point but must be identified correctly as (вИТ4, 0) and correspond to the sketch. See examples below: B1: Translation (the maximum at (пА≠3, 2) can be ignored) B1: Minimum at the origin B1: Passes through (пА≠4, 0) B0: The x intercepts are contradictory for a translation (not 4 units apart) B0: No minimum at the origin B1: Passes through (пА≠4, 0) B1: Translation B1: Minimum at the origin (the intention is clear) B1: Passes through (пА≠4, 0) B0: Incorrect shape B1: Minimum at the origin B1: Passes through (пА≠4, 0) (вИТ4, 0) ,0 пГ¶пГґ пГІпГЈ пГ®пГЄ (b) B1B1B1 (3) Total 6 Notes: If there is any ambiguity regarding coordinates, the sketch takes precedence. B1: Reflection in the y-axis. This requires a minimum on the negative x-axis and a maximum to the left of the y-axis in quadrant 2. If the maximum is on the y-axis score B0. The curve must continue upwards to the left of the y-axis to reach a maximum in quadrant 2. The curve must extend into quadrant 4 as shown. B1: Minimum at (вИТ1, 0). Allow just пА≠1 marked in the correct place and condone (0, вИТ1) as long as it is marked in the correct place. Allow to score away from the sketch but must be identified correctly as (вИТ1, 0) and correspond to the sketch. B1: Passes through (0, 2) and passes through or touches ,0 пГ¶пГґ пГІпГЈ пГ®пГЄ .
